author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 14: 2 Tier-3 docs (scheduler-class siblings of CFS). kernel/sched/rt.md (SCHED_FIFO+SCHED_RR; per-prio bitmap rq, push/pull, RT throttling 95%, cpupri tracking — 11 REQ / 9 AC, 0 open) + kernel/sched/deadline.md (SCHED_DEADLINE = EDF+CBS; admission test, EDF rb-tree, CBS budget+replenish, cpudl max-heap, SIGXCPU on overrun — 13 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open). 15 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~67 .design docs. Next: kernel/sched supporting Tier-3s (load-balance + topology + pelt) or pivot to net/* ipv6 / unix / packet socket family.
